author: anon-13168fa2
content: Plan: Add a 'Try It: Your First Rust Program' section at the end of the Language Landscape chapter, before the closing. Something tiny - a single-file Rust program the student builds with their agent. Goal is just to touch the compiler: cargo new, cargo run, see output, make a small change, see it compile. Not a real project, just enough to demystify the toolchain before Phase 2 where they build for real. Should feel like the terminal practice section in the Workspace chapter - quick, hands-on, confidence-building.
